hero.title: Sweida Sustainable Development Fund
hero.subtitle: A vision driven by daily needs, providing sustainable solutions in water, energy, and services.

content.location_text: Sweida enjoys a strategic location on a volcanic plateau known as 'Jabal al-Arab', providing geographical importance for trade and fertile lands.
content.vision_text1: We aim to improve water, electricity, health, and education through a non-profit fund.
content.vision_text2: Our goal is an integrated model that restores economic balance and enhances quality of life.
content.water_energy_text: Real development starts with stable water and reliable energy. We focus on solar power for wells and clean electricity for hospitals.

header_title: Modern Electricity, The Secret of Connections
header_subtitle: Towards a Sustainable Future for Sweida Governorate
footer_msg: We are committed to transparency and periodic reporting to build a more stable and prosperous future for Sweida.

water.title: WATER
water.desc: Providing sustainable water resources to ensure a better life for Sweida.

nature.title: NATURE
nature.desc: Protecting nature and increasing green spaces for a sustainable ecological balance.

creation.title: CREATION
creation.desc: Supporting innovation and small projects to boost the local economy.
